claim: Sora 2 generates realistic human faces with correct facial expressions, lighting, and hair details from text descriptions
actionable: For humanoid video generation, test Sora 2 as alternative to traditional video production for cost/speed benefits

claim: Sora 2 significantly improves physics accuracy (basketball rebounds correctly, subtle muscle movements) vs prior models morphing reality
actionable: Use Sora 2 for videos requiring accurate physics simulation; may reduce need for manual physics retakes

claim: Sora 2 supports synchronized dialogue and sound effects, enabling end-to-end video generation with audio
actionable: For video+audio projects, Sora 2 eliminates need for separate audio generation and dubbing workflows

claim: Sora 2 world models are designed to train embodied AI systems; simulated environments replace expensive real-world robot training
actionable: For robotics projects, use Sora 2 to generate synthetic training videos before deploying to real robots

claim: Sora 2 app enables users to capture their likeness in 30 seconds, then cast themselves into any generated scene via Cameo feature
actionable: For personalized video content, use Cameo to insert users into AI-generated scenarios with minimal setup
